hotels.description_en:
Spacious Accommodations: Shamba Pori Lodge in Babati offers spacious rooms with private bathrooms, garden views, and free WiFi. The property is pet-friendly and includes a terrace, balcony, and outdoor fireplace.
Dining and Leisure: Guests can enjoy international cuisine at the on-site restaurant and bar. The lodge features a terrace, balcony, indoor play area, and picnic area. Free on-site private parking and bicycle parking are available.
Location and Attractions: Located 119 km from Lake Manyara Airport, the lodge provides easy access to Babati attractions. The surrounding area offers opportunities for hiking, cycling, and birdwatching.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Maasai Eco Boma & Lodge in Makuyuni offers apartment-style accommodation with private bathrooms, mountain views, and terraces. Each unit includes a kitchenette, work desk, and outdoor furniture.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy free WiFi in public areas, an outdoor fireplace, and an outdoor seating area. Additional amenities include a terrace, patio, and free on-site private parking.
Dining Experience: A continental buffet breakfast is served daily, featuring juice, fresh pastries, pancakes, cheese, and fruits. Evening entertainment and live music enhance the stay.
Local Attractions: Located 42 km from Lake Manyara Airport, the property offers walking tours and cultural classes. Highly rated for its attentive staff and child-friendly environment.

Wellness and Leisure: The property features a spa and wellness centre, sauna, hot tub, and a 24-hour front desk. Additional facilities include a restaurant, bar, and paid airport shuttle service.
